Wave 153 — Theme Standardizer Phase 2 Tests

Theme Package:

  ✅ index.ts re-exports tailwind-preset

  ✅ package.json has css-variables export path

CJS Color Map:
  ✅ tailwind-colors.cjs loads without error
  ✅ tailwind-colors has all 26 tokens
  ✅ tailwind-colors values use CSS variables

Web App Integration:
  ✅ tailwind.config.cjs imports fieldOpsColors
  ✅ tailwind.config.cjs extends colors with fo namespace
  ✅ tailwind.config.cjs loads successfully
  ✅ input.css has light theme CSS variables
  ✅ input.css has dark theme CSS variables

Regression:
  ✅ tailwind.config.cjs still has darkMode class
  ✅ input.css still has scrollbar styles
  ✅ tokens.ts still exports original tokens

22/22 tests passed
